title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Jio Platforms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Backend Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
